misconfig_patterns: Ray dashboard on port 8265 accessible without authentication
Dashboard exposes full cluster topology including all worker IPs
No built-in auth on serving endpoints
5-signal ShadowRay 2.0 attacker-fleet IoC: 10-job cap, _aaN submission ID suffix, 1/3-1/3-1/3 RUNNING/FAILED/SUCCEEDED status mix, same-minute submission prefix across hosts, multi-port-per-IP fanout

active_probe.false_positive_check: /api/jobs/ returns JSON array (NOT /api/cluster_status — that endpoint is auth-gated on current Ray versions and gives a confident-zero false-negative). See ShadowRay 2.0 IoC pattern in NuClide 2026-06-08 case study.

deployment_tells: Dashboard at :8265 with no auth — primary signal
Ray cluster head node log lines in banners
pivot_paths: GET /api/v0/status → full cluster topology → list all worker node IPs
Worker IPs → expand scan scope to full cluster
Serving deployment names → infer models and application structure
